meaning: Ha Meem (special letters at start of chapter)
as a complete book for recitation
surely perhaps you all/definitely so that you all (connects to تَعْقِلُونَ)
you all understand (so that you all may understand)
and indeed it (referring to the Quran)
in (location within أُمِّ ٱلْكِتٰبِ - the Mother of the Book)
the book (in أُمِّ ٱلْكِتٰبِ - Mother of the Book)
a people (object of أَفَنَضْرِبُ - should we turn away)
those who definitely go beyond limits (describes قوما)
he comes to them (referring to the prophets mentioned in نَّبِىٍّ)
except (connects to يَأْتِيهِم - comes to them)
so we destroyed (in response to أَشَدَّ)
from them (referring to those who were stronger)
and he passed by (connected to فَأَهْلَكْنَآ - then We destroyed)
the first ones (plural, referring to previous nations)
you asked them (about who created the heavens and earth)
who (asking about the creator of السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ)
he created them (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ 'the heavens')
The All-Knowing (attribute of Allah in this ayah)
The one who (describes جَعَلَ - the one who made)
he made (connected to لَكُمُ - for you all)
for you all (connected to جَعَلَ - made)
a resting place (what Allah made the earth into)
and he made/put (connected to جَعَلَ earlier in the ayah)
for you all (recipients of جَعَلَ - made)
in it/her (referring to الْأَرْضَ - the earth)
so that you all might (do تَهْتَدُونَ)
and the one who/which (subject of نَزَّلَ)
he sent down repeatedly (subject of وَٱلَّذِى - and the One who)
water (as the object being sent down)
by/with a measure (after بِ in وَٱلَّذِى نَزَّلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءًۢ)
so/then we brought to life (acted on بَلْدَةً - a land)
and the one who/that which (subject of خَلَقَ)
the pairs/types (object of خَلَقَ - He created)
all of them (referring to الْأَزْوٰجَ - the pairs)
for you all (object of جَعَلَ - He made)
of the ship (connected to مِّنَ - from)
you (all) ride (referring to the people who use the ships and animals mentioned)
so that you all become balanced (on ظُهُورِهِۦ)
your (all of you) master/caretaker (referring to Allah as the Lord of the people being addressed)
upon him/it (referring to ظُهُورِهِ - its back)
and you all say (so that you say سُبْحٰنَ)
the one who/which (refers to what Allah has made subservient)
he made completely subservient (referring to Allah in this ayah)
this (referring to what was just mentioned)
those who have power/control (object of كُنَّا)
and indeed we (to رَبِّنَا - our Lord)
and they made (something into something for لَهُ)
a part (object of جَعَلُوا - they made)
the human being (object of جَعَلُوا - they made)
truly/indeed a constant denier/rejecter (referring to mankind in general)
a very clear one (describing something that makes things obvious)
from what (subject of يَخْلُقُ - he creates)
and He chose you all (as His special ones)
was given good news (subject is أَحَدُهُم - one of them)
one of them (subject of بُشِّرَ - was given news)
an example (object of ضَرَبَ - set forth)
he became/remained (subject of وَجْهُهُۥ مُسْوَدًّا - his face became dark)
And is the one who (subject of يُنَشَّؤُا۟)
and they made/set (referring to the disbelievers making angels into females)
the angels (object of جَعَلُوا - they made)
did they witness? (referring to those who claimed angels are female)
their creation (object of أَشَهِدُوا - did they witness?)
if (hypothetical, introducing the condition 'if the Most Merciful had willed')
The Most Merciful One (subject of مَا عَبَدْنٰهُم)
we worshipped them (referring to false gods mentioned earlier)
they guess without knowledge (subject of قَالُوا)
we brought them/gave to them (كِتٰبًا - a book)
from (emphasizing the start point of قَبْلِهِۦ 'before it')
with/by/in it (referring to كِتٰبًا - a book)
they are firmly holding/grasping (subject of فَهُم)
But rather (contrasting with what was said before)
they said (responding to what came before)
indeed we (subject of وَجَدْنَآ - we found)
a way/community (that we found our forefathers following)
except (in this ayah, it introduces what the wealthy people said)
indeed we (subject of وَجَدْنَا - we found)
their traces (referring to their forefathers mentioned as ءَابَآءَنَا in the ayah)
with what (connected to أُرْسِلْتُم - you were sent)
with/by him/it (referring to أَهْدَىٰ - better guidance)
and so we took revenge (from مِنْهُمْ - from them)
from them (referring to those who were punished)
and when (connecting to قَالَ - he said)
to his father (object of قَالَ - he said)
free/innocent (from مِمَّا تَعْبُدُونَ - what you worship)
so indeed he/it (referring to the One who created me)
and he made it (referring to كَلِمَةً 'word/statement') into (بَاقِيَةً 'lasting')
a word (as the object being made lasting)
But rather (contradicting what was claimed before and introducing the fact that Allah gave them and their fathers enjoyment)
these ones (in a way that connects to what comes after)
until, up to (جَآءَهُمُ - before they came)
came to them (referring to those mentioned earlier in the ayah)
and when (followed by جَآءَهُمُ - came to them)
magic (subject of قَالُوا - what they said)
with/by it (referring to الْحَقُّ - the truth)
was sent down (object of قَالُوا - what they said)
Are they? (subject of يَقْسِمُونَ - they distribute)
we divided fairly (subject of distributing معيشتهم their provision)
and we lifted up (some of them above others in ranks)
some of them (object of فَوْقَ - above)
as something to be mocked (object of يَتَّخِذَ)
that (introduces what would happen in لَجَعَلْنَا)
one (feminine, as a description of أُمَّةً/nation)
we would surely make (consequence in response to لَوْلَا/if not for)
he rejects/denies (referring to one who rejects belief in الرَّحْمٰنِ - the Most Merciful)
for their houses (referring to the houses of those who disbelieve in the Most Merciful)
roofs (as the object being made in this verse)
from/of (describing what سُقُفًا 'roofs' are made of فِضَّةٍ 'silver')
and many places to go up (that they climb upon)
they appear/ascend (referring to the people climbing upon their houses)
and couches/thrones (as objects being acted upon)
they recline comfortably (referring to the luxurious furnishings mentioned in the ayah)
and decoration/adornment (coordinated with previous items in list)
that, that one (masculine singular demonstrative pronoun)
when/as soon as (connecting مَتٰعُ with what came before)
your Lord (possessed by you, after عِندَ)
for the ones who guard against evil
and whoever (subject of يَعْشُ - turns away)
away from (something being turned away from ذِكْرِ)
The Most Merciful (one of Allah's names)
a devil (object of نُقَيِّضْ - we assign)
and so he is (predicate of لَهُۥ قَرِينٌ)
for him (connected to نُقَيِّضْ - we assign)
a close companion (of him - referring back to مَن in the ayah)
and indeed they (subject of لَيَصُدُّونَهُمْ - they prevent)
that they (subject of يَحْسَبُونَ - they assume)
until (reaching إِذَا جَآءَنَا - when he came to us)
when (followed by جَآءَنَا - he came to us)
he came to us (subject of قَالَ - he said)
he said (introducing what comes next in the ayah)
oh if only/would that (expressing strong regret)
the two easts (after the word بُعْدَ meaning 'distance')
and how bad! (expressing strong disapproval of the companion mentioned)
the close companion (as the subject speaking in this verse)
the day (object of يَنفَعَكُمُ - will not benefit you)
that you all (are partners in punishment)
those who share together (in the punishment)
you make (someone) hear (addressing الصُّمَّ - the deaf)
the deaf ones (object of تُسْمِعُ - make hear)
you guide (addressing the Prophet ﷺ about guiding الْعُمْىَ - the blind)
the blind ones (object of تُسْمِعُ - you make hear)
in (something that is ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ - clear error)
a clear state of being lost (after في/in)
then if/whether (connects to نَذْهَبَنَّ - we will take away)
we will definitely go away (threat to those who reject faith)
with you (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ in this ayah)
we will surely show you (object of وَعَدْنٰهُمْ)
the one which/that/who (referring back to what we will show you)
those who are truly powerful (subject of فَإِنَّا)
so hold firmly! (as a command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
by/with the one which (connects to أُوحِىَ)
it was revealed (object of فَٱسْتَمْسِكْ - so hold fast to)
to you (object of أُوحِىَ - was revealed)
and indeed it (referring to the Quran)
surely for you (referring to the remembrance/mention ذِكْرٌ)
and will/shall (connected to تُسْـَٔلُونَ - you will be questioned)
from (connecting رُّسُلِنَآ to what comes after)
did we make/establish? (asking about آلِهَةً - gods)
deities (as objects being worshipped in يُعْبَدُونَ)
they are worshipped (referring to false gods in آلِهَةً)
he came to them (subject of يَضْحَكُونَ - they laugh)
with Our signs (that were brought to them)
we show them (referring to the signs/miracles mentioned in مِّنْ ءَايَةٍ)
they go/come back (in response to العَذَابِ/the punishment)
your Lord (being called upon in ٱدْعُ)
Then when (connects to كَشَفْنَا - we removed)
the punishment (object of كَشَفْنَا - we removed)
O my people! (being called by فِرْعَوْنُ)
is it not? (asking about مُلْكُ مِصْرَ - the kingdom of Egypt)
for me, belonging to me (connected to مُلْكُ/kingdom)
beneath me (in Pharaoh's boastful speech about the rivers flowing beneath him)
so do you not? (connected to تُبْصِرُونَ - you see)
I (strongly emphasized, speaking about Pharaoh in this context)
who/which/that (referring to هٰذَا - this - from previous phrase)
he (referring to the one being discussed in this ayah)
and not (negates يَكَادُ يُبِينُ - 'he can hardly express')
he almost does/is almost doing (something) (subject of يُبِينُ)
Then why not (questioning why أَسْوِرَةٌ weren't given)
was thrown (something that happened to أَسْوِرَةٌ - bracelets)
with him (referring to Pharaoh mentioned earlier in the ayah)
those who are joined together (with the angels)
and so they obeyed him (actively/willingly) (result of فَٱسْتَخَفَّ قَوْمَهُۥ - he made his people light/foolish)
they were (subject of فَأَطَاعُوهُ - so they obeyed him)
a people (object of فَٱسْتَخَفَّ - he made light of)
so We drowned them (after they angered Us)
son (subject of this phrase, referring to Jesus)
an example (object of ضُرِبَ - was struck/given)
when (referring to يَصِدُّونَ - they turn away)
your people (subject of يَصِدُّونَ - they turn away)
they are turning away (referring to قَوْمُكَ - your people)
they presented it (as an example about ءَأٰلِهَتُنَا)
except (what follows from what was mentioned before)
in argument (describing how they did something)
those who argue/dispute (subject of هُمْ قَوْمٌ)
he (referring to عَبْدٌ 'servant' in this ayah)
an example (object of جَعَلْنٰهُ - we made him)
and even if (connecting to previous statement)
we want/wish (in لَجَعَلْنَا - we would make)
they come after/replace/succeed (referring to angels who would succeed humans on earth)
surely a knowledge (of السَّاعَةِ - the Hour)
so do not (doubt about عِلْمٌ - knowledge)
about it/her (referring to السَّاعَةِ - the Hour)
and not (negates يَصُدَّنَّكُمُ - let [him] avert you)
he surely blocks/prevents you all (referring to ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ blocking people)
the satan/devil (subject of يَصُدَّنَّكُمُ - prevents you)
for you all (being addressed by الشَّيْطٰنُ)
and when (introduces Jesus coming with clear proofs)
he said (subject of جِئْتُكُم - I have come to you)
indeed/certainly (emphasizing جِئْتُكُم - I have come to you)
and so that I make clear
in it (referring to what they differ about)
Allah (as the object being feared in فَٱتَّقُوا۟)
indeed/truly (emphasizing that اللَّهَ is my Lord and your Lord)
this (pointing to the straight path that will be mentioned)
and then they differed (with each other)
so woe (connected to فَٱخْتَلَفَ before it)
do/does/did (asking if they are waiting for the Hour)
the Hour (referring to the Day of Judgment)
it comes to them (السَّاعَةَ comes to them)
suddenly (describing how تَأْتِيَهُم/it comes to them)
they perceive (referring to those who deny the Hour)
on that day (when friends become enemies, as mentioned in the surrounding ayah)
enemy (subject of يَوْمَئِذٍۭ - on that day)
today (when there will be no fear)
and not (connected to لَا خَوْفٌ - no fear)
you (all) feel sad (in response to لَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْكُمُ)
in/by our signs (believed in by ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟)
and they were (believers in our signs)
all of you enter! (command to a group)
and your spouses (referring to multiple people)
it is being circled around (passive voice, referring to what happens in Paradise)
upon them (referring to the people being served in Paradise)
made of (describing صِحَافٍ plates/vessels of ذَهَبٍ gold)
the souls/selves (as the subject of تَشْتَهِيهِ)
and she experiences pleasure (subject of الْأَعْيُنُ)
the eyes (subject of تَلَذُّ - finds pleasure)
ones who last forever (describing أَنتُمْ 'you all')
you all were made to inherit it
because of what (connects تِلْكَ ٱلْجَنَّةُ with كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ)
you (all) do/perform (referring to the deeds that earned you Paradise)
for you all (who will have فٰكِهَةٌ)
those who remain forever (plural, in a regular case)
and they (connecting to لَا يُفَتَّرُ عَنْهُمْ - 'it is not lightened for them')
in it (referring to the punishment mentioned earlier)
those who are in despair (subject of هُمْ)
we wronged them (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier)
they were (plural masculine subject of ٱلظَّالِمِينَ)
the people who wrong others (acted upon by كَانُوا)
O master! (being called by the people in Hell)
so that he may decide/judge (addressing مٰلِكُ)
indeed you all (being addressed by مٰلِكُ)
indeed certainly (followed by جِئْنٰكُم/We brought you)
and yet/but still (connects while contrasting with لَقَدْ جِئْنٰكُم بِٱلْحَقِّ)
those who dislike/hate (describes أَكْثَر - most of you)
or (connecting to أَبْرَمُوٓا۟, asking if they made a plan)
they made (something) firm (subject of فَإِنَّا مُبْرِمُونَ)
a matter/affair (object of أَبْرَمُوا - they determined)
those who make firm (subject of أَبْرَمُوٓا۟)
Or (introducing a question in أَمْ يَحْسَبُونَ - 'Or do they think')
they think/consider (that they know what أَنَّا لَا نَسْمَعُ - that We do not hear)
that we (object of يَحْسَبُونَ - they assume)
we hear (the سِرَّهُمْ secret of them)
their secret (object of نَسْمَعُ - we hear)
yes indeed! (contradicting 'we do not hear' in أَنَّا لَا نَسْمَعُ)
with them, near them, in their presence (subjects of يَكْتُبُونَ)
they write (our messengers write their secrets)
if (introducing a hypothetical condition about لِلرَّحْمٰنِ وَلَدٌ)
glorified, exalted above all imperfection (describes رَبِّ)
Lord of (السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ - the heavens and earth)
Lord of (السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ - the heavens and earth)
they describe (referring to those who attribute false things to Allah)
so leave them! (command to one person, referring to the disbelievers who will play and amuse themselves until they meet their promised Day)
they plunge into (connected to فَذَرْهُمْ - so leave them)
and they play (connected to يَخُوضُوا۟ - they indulge)
they meet with/encounter (in the future, referring to يَوْمَهُمُ - their Day)
their day (object of يُلٰقُوا - they meet)
they are promised (referring to those who are playing and amusing themselves)
a deity/god (in the heavens and earth)
and in (connects to previous statement about deity in heaven)
and He is blessed/exalted (referring to Allah)
the One who (referring to Allah in this context)
between them both (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ)
of the Hour (referring to knowledge of Judgment Day)
except (those who testify to the truth)
he bore witness (to الْحَقِّ - the truth)
with/by the truth (in the genitive case)
you asked them (speaking to one person about multiple people)
created them (referring to the people being asked)
then how (in response to لَيَقُولُنَّ ٱللَّهُ - they will surely say 'Allah')
they are turned away (from the truth)
O Lord! (calling out to Allah in the ayah)
so turn away!/so forgive! (connected to وَقُلْ - and say)
away from them (referring to disbelievers mentioned earlier)
they know (referring to the disbelievers being addressed in the ayah)
